ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR(AND( ISPICKVAL( Problem_type__c,'New User Request'), ISBLANK( New_User_Email_ID__c ) ) , AND(NOT( ISBLANK( New_User_Email_ID__c )) , NOT(ISPICKVAL( Problem_type__c,'New User Request'))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_SUPPORT_001: IF 'problem type' is New User Request, ensure 'New User Creation Details' section is populated. Otherwise leave it blank.
